sections.title: Before starting Fairytale I - Growing Pains

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do crops and such survive down here? Surely they need a bit of sunlight?

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: Clearly you come from a plane dependent on sunlight. Down here, the plants grow in the aura of faerie.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's so good about this place?

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: Zanaris is a meeting point of cultures. Those from many worlds converge here to exchange knowledge and goods.

sections.title: After finishing Fairytale II - Cure a Queen

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you managed to work out a plan yet?

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: Not yet, [player name], but it looks like we'll need to ask you for your help again, I'm afraid. I'll be able to tell you more once we have finished making our battle plans.

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.

lines.speaker: Fairy Queen
lines.text: Please solve this for me. I have other things to be thinking about.
